title: tanacetum glanduliferum
intro: Tanacetum glanduliferum, also known as glandular tanacetum, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and the Mediterranean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum glanduliferum include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating digestive problems and reducing pain and fever. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum glanduliferum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
